{{Infobox location
| name = Akura clan territory
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Akura clan]] territory is a massive expanse that encompasses approximately three-quarters of the continent. The heart of this domain features an intimidating capital that resembles a fortress for giants rather than a city, characterized by immense black walls topped with [[sword]] blades. These fortifications are constructed from forged [[madra]] that possesses qualities of death-madra, emitting a sense of dread and cold sounds. The clan's headquarters is so secure that escaping it would be nearly impossible for most. Within this territory, the clan maintains significant influence and resources, though they have faced various challenges including famine in the south, incursions on their northern borders, and loss of land to nature. The clan's reach is extensive, and they are known for using absolute darkness during interrogations or imprisonment. While the [[Akura clan]] has historically provided protection to the [[Blackflame Empire]] against [[dragons]], they generally remain apathetic toward others unless it suits their interests.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The heart of [[Akura clan territory]] features a massive wall made of black [[Forged madra]] topped with [[sword]] blades.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura]] territory contains various families, sects, and clans.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Dreadgods]] will run through [[Akura]] territory to get what they are after.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Wandering Titan]] has reached the edge of [[Akura]] territory.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] needs to get out of [[Akura]] territory.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“The Wandering Titan has made his way to the edge of Akura territory. We go to protect the people and to drive away the vultures.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
